Selected Work

A collection of technical deep-dives.

Local Voice Agent

Real-time voice processing using Whisper and Ollama. Zero-latency inference on Apple Silicon.

Technical Deep Dive

Leveraged MPS framework for accelerating PyTorch inferences on Apple Silicon. Utilized Ollama for local LLM inference to minimize latency.

PythonMPSMetal

Next.js Portfolio

Ultra-fast personal site with custom component architecture and Framer Motion.

Technical Deep Dive

Built with Next.js App Router, using heavily optimized client components for interactivity while maintaining server-side rendering for performance.
